name: US500 M5 EMA Pullback Trend Continuation
hypothesis: US500 M5 during US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC) exhibits trend-pullback continuation: in an EMA20>EMA50>EMA200 stack with ADX>=18, a shallow pullback where low touches EMA20 and RSI(14) dips to 40-55 then reclaims, produces a trend-continuation entry with PF>=2.0.

entry_rules.long: ema20>ema50 AND ema50>ema200 AND adx14>=18 AND low_prev <= ema20_prev AND close > ema20 AND rsi14 between 40 and 60 AND close > open
entry_rules.short: ema20<ema50 AND ema50<ema200 AND adx14>=18 AND high_prev >= ema20_prev AND close < ema20 AND rsi14 between 40 and 60 AND close < open

regime_filter.rationale: Pullback continuation requires an underlying trend and non-dead vol; pure range kills win rate.

notes: Explicitly targets US500 (prior gen ran this candidate on wrong symbols). Verify symbol mapping to broker (US500, SPX500, US500.cash).
